description: Poll MINI_PIPE for completion - Query: orchestrator.get_run_status(run_id). Wait for run state: succeeded | failed | quarantined.

Collect aggregated execution results - Query: orchestrator.get_run_steps(run_id), orchestrator.get_run_events(run_id). Summarize: total tasks, tasks succeeded, failed, skipped, execution duration, files modified.
Return execution summary to ACMS - ExecutionResult: {success, run_id, tasks_completed, tasks_failed, execution_time_seconds, error, output_data}.
GUARDRAILS: Update patches_applied counter - run_stats["patches_applied"] = <count from execution results>. Used to detect planning loops (planning without execution).

Correlate execution results with gaps - For each task in execution results: - Extract gap_ids from task metadata - Look up gaps in gap_registry - Determine if gap addressed: task succeeded + verified → gap resolved, task failed → gap in_progress, task skipped → gap deferred.

Update gap_registry with new statuses - For each gap: if addressed → gap.status=RESOLVED, if attempted but failed → gap.status=IN_PROGRESS, if not attempted → gap.status=DEFERRED. Associate gap with: run_id, workstream_id, task_id (in metadata).
Persist updated gap statuses - Save gap_registry.json with updated gap records. Atomic write (temp file + rename).

GUARDRAILS: Final anti-pattern detection - Call: anti_pattern_detector.detect_all(run_context). Check: hallucinated success (final summary), planning loop, all runbook patterns. Log all detections to ledger and console.
